cn.description:
梁的挠度是一个功能强大且多功能的计算器，适用于梁、二维桁架和二维框架。界面简洁直观，图形输出采用最先进技术。除了反力、剪切、弯矩和挠度结果外，梁的挠度还能计算横截面和梁沿线的内部剪切和弯曲应力。

二维框架和桁架编辑器

二维编辑器与梁编辑器无缝集成。绘制任意框架和桁架结构，并使用与梁相同的简单界面应用载荷和约束。您可以直接在二维编辑器中可视化结果，或选择一个梁以获取更多见解。

内部应力

获取内部弯曲和剪切应力图，除了剪切、弯矩和挠度图。可以沿着梁的长度以及横截面的垂直轴线可视化内部应力。

横截面编辑器

编辑内置的横截面。惯性矩和面积值会自动计算并应用到其余的梁计算中。

更多功能

• 内置数据库包含更多数据供您参考和方便使用。
• 可选应用梁自重
• 无限设计文件
• 快速启动模板

联系我们

我们期待您的反馈！如果您有任何问题、疑问或评论，请发送电子邮件至contact@ketchep.com。

cn.description:
Top 5 Platzierung in Deutschland, Australien, UK und Frankreich der meist verkauften Sport Apps.

----- Beschreibung -----
Die präzise Atemtraining-App für Freitaucher, Schnorchler und alle, die länger die Luft anhalten wollen.

Stell dir vor, du schnorchelst im Urlaub im Meer und siehst unter Wasser große bunte Fische in 6 Meter Tiefe – am liebsten möchtest du mit einem langen Atem hinuntertauchen und unvergessliche Fotos machen. Mit Apnea Trainer ist das möglich. Bei dreimal wöchentlichem Training erreichst du schnell die doppelte Zeit unter Wasser.

Dein persönlicher Trainingsplan:
Beantworte ein paar kurze Fragen zu deinem Niveau und deinem Ziel – Apnea Trainer erstellt daraus einen mehrwöchigen Trainingsplan, der genau zu dir passt. Jede Einheit ist terminiert und baut auf der vorigen auf, sodass du Woche für Woche messbar besser wirst. Dein Fortschritt wird automatisch verfolgt – du musst nur noch trainieren.

Vier Trainingsmodi:
• Apnea Training – Einatmen, Anhalten, Ausatmen. Optimale Intervalle für maximale Leistungssteigerung.
• Pranayama – Vier-Phasen-Atmung zur Entspannung und Vorbereitung direkt vor dem Schnorcheln oder Freitauchen.
• Cyclic – Zyklisches Atemtraining in Runden mit Halte- und Erholungsphasen, das deine CO₂-Toleranz gezielt steigert.
• Custom Pro – Alle vier Phasen frei einstellbar von 0 bis 240 Sekunden für Wettkampfsportler.

Der intelligente Performance-Index passt die Trainingszeiten automatisch an dein Niveau an – du wirst besser, ohne selbst rechnen zu müssen. Optische und akustische Anweisungen (Stimmen und Haptik) begleiten jede Phase. Kein Nachdenken nötig – einfach trainieren.

Apple Watch:
Starte und steuere dein Training direkt vom Handgelenk. Während der Übung siehst du deine Herzfrequenz live und wirst durch sanfte Vibrationen durch jede Phase geführt – ganz ohne aufs iPhone zu schauen.

Stoppuhr & Fortschritt:
Mit der integrierten Apnoe-Stoppuhr misst und speicherst du deine besten Atemanhalteversuche. Verfolge deine Bestleistungen im Wochen-, Monats- oder Jahresdiagramm und teile besondere Meilensteine mit Freunden.

Motivierendes Streak-System:
Bleib dran und tauche immer tiefer. Halte deine tägliche Trainings-Serie, steige durch immer tiefere Zonen und sammle über 35 Auszeichnungen für Konstanz, Volumen und persönliche Rekorde. Verpasst du einen Tag, rettet ein Freeze-Joker deine Serie. Freigeschaltete Erfolge und neue Bestzeiten teilst du mit einem Tipp als schönes Bild in deinen sozialen Netzwerken.

Datenschutz & Sync ohne Account:
Deine Fortschritte werden ohne Anmeldung oder Account sicher über iCloud zwischen all deinen Apple-Geräten synchronisiert. Die Daten liegen ausschließlich in deiner privaten iCloud-Datenbank – kein Tracking, keine Weitergabe, höchste Datenschutzstandards.

Mehr als 10.000 aktive Nutzer bestätigen den Erfolg: Ungeübte können binnen 7 Tagen ihre Leistung verdoppeln, wenn Apnea Trainer täglich 3 Minuten genutzt wird. Bei fortgeschrittenen Sportlern sind konstante Leistungssprünge von 10 bis 20 Sekunden innerhalb von 10 Tagen bekannt.

Nutzungsbedingungen (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Datenschutz: https://apnea-trainer.com/de/privacy/

cn.trackName: 风光摄影助手Pro:风光摄影计划好帮手
cn.description:
风光摄影助手Pro 帮助摄影师理解并预判风光摄影中时间、光线与天象之间的关系。

每一张令人难忘的风光照片，背后都是时间、光线与天象的共同作用。真正的难点，往往不在于拍摄技巧，而在于：是否在正确的时间，站在了正确的方向上。

风光摄影助手Pro 正是为此而生。
它是一套帮助你理解光线节奏与天象变化的摄影规划工具，让你在出发之前，就能对拍摄时机做到心中有数。

你可以通过时间轴查看太阳、月亮与银河的位置变化，理解它们在一天中的运行节奏。3D 指南针以直观的方式呈现天体方向与高度，让光线不再只是抽象的数据，而是清晰可感知的空间关系。

在 AR 模式 下，你可以提前看到太阳、月亮和银河在真实环境中的位置，理解它们与地形、建筑之间的相对关系。应用还会清晰展示日出、日落、金色时刻、蓝色时刻、天文薄暮等重要星历信息，并支持将关键时刻添加到系统日历，方便提前规划出行。

风光摄影助手Pro 提供 无限制时间轴，可以预测任意日期、任意时刻的天体位置。同时还提供完整的 AR 创作工具，包括星轨模拟、取景器模拟、日月搜索、山峰识别以及彗星位置预测。

应用还提供完整的 地图规划能力，可以在地图上对任意地点进行预测，结合光污染地图与天气信息，提前判断是否值得出发，并保存和加载常用机位。

此外，风光摄影助手Pro 提供专业级的 3D VR 地形预测系统。
它基于真实地形数据进行计算，不依赖现场传感器，可在任何时间、任何地点稳定模拟山峰遮挡、天体路径与相机视野，帮助你在出发之前就完成构图判断。

在此基础上，应用还支持 无人机模拟构图功能。
你可以在真实地形的 3D 场景中模拟无人机飞行高度与镜头视角，提前验证航拍构图是否成立。

系统会实时显示无人机的真实离地高度（AGL）以及与目标构图点的水平距离等关键参数，辅助判断飞行高度风险与续航可行性。在飞行高度受到严格限制的环境下，该功能可以帮助你在规划阶段提前评估构图与飞行条件的匹配程度。

本功能仅用于构图与高度判断，不涉及适飞区、管制区或空域合规性的判定。

同时，系统内置常见民用无人机型号与镜头参数数据库，使模拟结果更贴近真实设备表现。

最新版本还引入了 建筑对齐规划系统。
应用内置了数十种常见建筑模型，你可以将它们摆放到地图上的任意位置，并按照真实尺寸进行缩放和旋转，从而在 VR 场景与无人机模拟场景中规划太阳、月亮或银河与建筑之间的精确对齐构图。

应用同时支持导入 .obj 格式的自定义 3D 模型。
你可以将自己的建筑或地标模型导入 App，与内置模型一起使用，让拍摄规划不再局限于系统预设的场景。

风光摄影助手Pro 不只是一个展示数据的工具，更是一个帮助摄影师做判断的工具。

无论是地面机位还是空中机位，它都帮助你在出发之前完成空间推演。

它让你在拍摄之前更清楚自己在等待什么，在现场更加从容，在创作中更加高效。

让风景的美，不再只依赖运气，而是建立在充分准备之上。

hk.description:
Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground.

Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out.

Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing.

Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs:

• Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency
• Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement
• Optimize routes to maximize each descent

Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all.

Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below.

Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun!

What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history.

Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun.

Features:

• intuitive one-finger portrait controls
• short runs that fit easily into a minute or two
• persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition
• multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises
• resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation
• a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress
• a market system for trading what you bring back
• progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run
• a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it
• no ads, and no pay-to-win systems
• by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase
• achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition

The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

hk.trackName: 和弦基因 - 吉他樂理
hk.description:
GenChord Guitar 是一款以吉他指板為核心的和弦與樂理工具。它不只是告訴你某個和弦「怎麼按」，而是把和弦、音階、指型、順階關係與延伸音放在同一張指板上，幫助你理解每個和聲結構為什麼成立。

你可以在 Library 中按根音、和弦類型和延伸音查找和弦，支援三和弦、七和弦、六和弦、sus、aug、dim、half-dim、b5、#5、bb7，以及 9、11、13 等延伸音組合。進入 Chord Explain 後，同一個和弦會在 Mi、Sol、La、Si、Re 五大指型中展開，並與 CAGED 系統對應。

Diatonic 可以根據主音和調式生成 I-VII 級順階和弦，支援自然大調、自然小調、和聲小調、旋律小調和常見教會調式。Fingering 工具可以從任意琴弦與品位出發，建立對應音階，並在指型內生成和弦。你還可以試聽掃弦、琶音或隨機順序，並把常用和弦保存到 Collection，使用 iCloud Drive 或本機儲存管理。

GenChord Guitar 適合學習指板、爵士/流行伴奏、和聲分析、編曲和即興演奏。
hk.trackCensoredName: 和弦基因 - 吉他樂理

hk.trackName: 和弦基因 - 鋼琴鍵盤樂理圖形化查詢
hk.description:
這一次，你可以透過圖形化來學習和弦、音階。透過移動不同的和弦音來了解和弦的構成。你將徹底地了解和弦名稱的由來。此 App 能夠生成所有你能想到的和弦構成，方便你查詢記憶。理解音樂的過程，應當是清晰且簡單的。GenChord 幫你揭示音樂背後的核心原理。

・Library 查詢：和弦速查。從樂理層面生成所有可能性，不用懷疑全不全了，幾萬個和弦。中文用戶友好，所有和弦名都有中文翻譯。點按可以發聲，長按可以分解，右滑可以看詳情，裡面有這個和弦的所有解釋。功能媲美某本速查大全書。

・Query 查詢：和弦反查。反查基礎和弦 /omit 和弦 / 轉位和弦 / 所有加上 tension 的和弦。還有，在 playground 中還支援藍牙連結。現在你能享受到以前只有 PC 用戶才能用到的功能。

・Create 創作：屬於你的和弦，收集和弦進行。更多的控制功能，新增記憶曲線，新增簡譜音名。自由排列組合，一個和弦演化出無限種構成。流行 / 爵士小幫手，你值得擁有。

・Playground 遊樂場：用於教學、訓練、測試，是你玩音樂的自由空間、是你創作的瑞士軍刀。特別推薦 順階和弦（diatonic chord）功能，探索好聽的和弦進行。隨時隨地點按出動人的音符。所有實驗性功能都放進這裡面。

hk.description:
Top 5 Platzierung in Deutschland, Australien, UK und Frankreich der meist verkauften Sport Apps.

----- Beschreibung -----
Die präzise Atemtraining-App für Freitaucher, Schnorchler und alle, die länger die Luft anhalten wollen.

Stell dir vor, du schnorchelst im Urlaub im Meer und siehst unter Wasser große bunte Fische in 6 Meter Tiefe – am liebsten möchtest du mit einem langen Atem hinuntertauchen und unvergessliche Fotos machen. Mit Apnea Trainer ist das möglich. Bei dreimal wöchentlichem Training erreichst du schnell die doppelte Zeit unter Wasser.

Dein persönlicher Trainingsplan:
Beantworte ein paar kurze Fragen zu deinem Niveau und deinem Ziel – Apnea Trainer erstellt daraus einen mehrwöchigen Trainingsplan, der genau zu dir passt. Jede Einheit ist terminiert und baut auf der vorigen auf, sodass du Woche für Woche messbar besser wirst. Dein Fortschritt wird automatisch verfolgt – du musst nur noch trainieren.

Vier Trainingsmodi:
• Apnea Training – Einatmen, Anhalten, Ausatmen. Optimale Intervalle für maximale Leistungssteigerung.
• Pranayama – Vier-Phasen-Atmung zur Entspannung und Vorbereitung direkt vor dem Schnorcheln oder Freitauchen.
• Cyclic – Zyklisches Atemtraining in Runden mit Halte- und Erholungsphasen, das deine CO₂-Toleranz gezielt steigert.
• Custom Pro – Alle vier Phasen frei einstellbar von 0 bis 240 Sekunden für Wettkampfsportler.

Der intelligente Performance-Index passt die Trainingszeiten automatisch an dein Niveau an – du wirst besser, ohne selbst rechnen zu müssen. Optische und akustische Anweisungen (Stimmen und Haptik) begleiten jede Phase. Kein Nachdenken nötig – einfach trainieren.

Apple Watch:
Starte und steuere dein Training direkt vom Handgelenk. Während der Übung siehst du deine Herzfrequenz live und wirst durch sanfte Vibrationen durch jede Phase geführt – ganz ohne aufs iPhone zu schauen.

Stoppuhr & Fortschritt:
Mit der integrierten Apnoe-Stoppuhr misst und speicherst du deine besten Atemanhalteversuche. Verfolge deine Bestleistungen im Wochen-, Monats- oder Jahresdiagramm und teile besondere Meilensteine mit Freunden.

Motivierendes Streak-System:
Bleib dran und tauche immer tiefer. Halte deine tägliche Trainings-Serie, steige durch immer tiefere Zonen und sammle über 35 Auszeichnungen für Konstanz, Volumen und persönliche Rekorde. Verpasst du einen Tag, rettet ein Freeze-Joker deine Serie. Freigeschaltete Erfolge und neue Bestzeiten teilst du mit einem Tipp als schönes Bild in deinen sozialen Netzwerken.

Datenschutz & Sync ohne Account:
Deine Fortschritte werden ohne Anmeldung oder Account sicher über iCloud zwischen all deinen Apple-Geräten synchronisiert. Die Daten liegen ausschließlich in deiner privaten iCloud-Datenbank – kein Tracking, keine Weitergabe, höchste Datenschutzstandards.

Mehr als 10.000 aktive Nutzer bestätigen den Erfolg: Ungeübte können binnen 7 Tagen ihre Leistung verdoppeln, wenn Apnea Trainer täglich 3 Minuten genutzt wird. Bei fortgeschrittenen Sportlern sind konstante Leistungssprünge von 10 bis 20 Sekunden innerhalb von 10 Tagen bekannt.

Nutzungsbedingungen (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Datenschutz: https://apnea-trainer.com/de/privacy/

mo.description:
GenChord Guitar 是一款以吉他指板為核心的和弦與樂理工具。它不只是告訴你某個和弦「怎麼按」，而是把和弦、音階、指型、順階關係與延伸音放在同一張指板上，幫助你理解每個和聲結構為什麼成立。

你可以在 Library 中按根音、和弦類型和延伸音查找和弦，支援三和弦、七和弦、六和弦、sus、aug、dim、half-dim、b5、#5、bb7，以及 9、11、13 等延伸音組合。進入 Chord Explain 後，同一個和弦會在 Mi、Sol、La、Si、Re 五大指型中展開，並與 CAGED 系統對應。

Diatonic 可以根據主音和調式生成 I-VII 級順階和弦，支援自然大調、自然小調、和聲小調、旋律小調和常見教會調式。Fingering 工具可以從任意琴弦與品位出發，建立對應音階，並在指型內生成和弦。你還可以試聽掃弦、琶音或隨機順序，並把常用和弦保存到 Collection，使用 iCloud Drive 或本機儲存管理。

GenChord Guitar 適合學習指板、爵士/流行伴奏、和聲分析、編曲和即興演奏。

這一次，你可以透過圖形化來學習和弦、音階。透過移動不同的和弦音來了解和弦的構成。你將徹底地了解和弦名稱的由來。此 App 能夠生成所有你能想到的和弦構成，方便你查詢記憶。理解音樂的過程，應當是清晰且簡單的。GenChord 幫你揭示音樂背後的核心原理。

・Library 查詢：和弦速查。從樂理層面生成所有可能性，不用懷疑全不全了，幾萬個和弦。中文用戶友好，所有和弦名都有中文翻譯。點按可以發聲，長按可以分解，右滑可以看詳情，裡面有這個和弦的所有解釋。功能媲美某本速查大全書。

・Query 查詢：和弦反查。反查基礎和弦 /omit 和弦 / 轉位和弦 / 所有加上 tension 的和弦。還有，在 playground 中還支援藍牙連結。現在你能享受到以前只有 PC 用戶才能用到的功能。

・Create 創作：屬於你的和弦，收集和弦進行。更多的控制功能，新增記憶曲線，新增簡譜音名。自由排列組合，一個和弦演化出無限種構成。流行 / 爵士小幫手，你值得擁有。

・Playground 遊樂場：用於教學、訓練、測試，是你玩音樂的自由空間、是你創作的瑞士軍刀。特別推薦 順階和弦（diatonic chord）功能，探索好聽的和弦進行。隨時隨地點按出動人的音符。所有實驗性功能都放進這裡面。

Introducing frame and building benchmark examples and extensive improvements throughout the app!

• NEW: Examples gallery in the home screen, including new examples for frames and buildings.  Click on the button with a book icon to open it.

• NEW: The new eyedropper button in the frame editor allows you to copy the material and cross-section from one beam to another.  To use it, select a beam, press the eyedropper button, and then select another beam to copy from.

Thank you for your continued support and feedback!  Reach us at contact@ketchep.com with any questions or comments.
mo.description:
樑的撓度是一款功能強大且多功能的計算器，適用於梁、二維桁架和二維框架。介面簡單直觀，圖形輸出採用最先進技術。除了反應力、剪力、彎矩和撓度結果之外，樑的撓度還能計算梁截面和梁長度上的內部剪力和彎曲應力。

二維框架和桁架編輯器

二維編輯器與梁編輯器無縫整合。繪製任意框架和桁架結構，並使用與梁相同的簡單介面來應用荷載和約束。您可以直接在二維編輯器中視覺化結果，或選擇一個梁以獲得更多洞見。

內部應力

除了剪力、彎矩和撓度圖之外，還可以獲得內部彎曲應力和剪力的圖表。可以沿著梁的長度以及截面的垂直軸線可視化內部應力。

截面編輯器

編輯內置截面。轉動慣量和面積值會自動計算並應用於其餘的梁計算。

更多功能

• 內置數據庫包含更多參考數據，方便使用。
• 可選擇應用梁自重
• 無限設計文件
• 快速開始模板

聯繫

如有任何問題或評論，請發送電子郵件至contact@ketchep.com。

歡迎遊玩Balatro官方遊戲！

Balatro是一款混合接龍與撲克等紙牌遊戲的神奇混合體，讓您以前所未見的方式扭曲遊戲規則，令人愛不釋手、滿意無比！
你的目標：打造強力的撲克手牌，擊敗Boss盲注。 
找尋改變遊戲的新小丑，創造精彩絕倫的組合！贏得足量籌碼，擊敗詭譎頭目，在遊戲中尋覓隱藏獎勵出牌和牌組。 
要擊敗大頭目，贏得最終挑戰並贏得遊戲，您需要聚集可以獲得的一切輔助手段。

遊戲特性：

每次遊玩都不一樣：每次抓牌、棄牌和小丑都能極大程度地變化您本次遊玩的進程。
多種遊戲物品：發現超過150種小丑，每種小丑都有特別的能力。將它們與不同牌組相結合，升級牌和禮券提升得分。
多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。

----- Beschreibung -----
Die präzise Atemtraining-App für Freitaucher, Schnorchler und alle, die länger die Luft anhalten wollen.

Stell dir vor, du schnorchelst im Urlaub im Meer und siehst unter Wasser große bunte Fische in 6 Meter Tiefe – am liebsten möchtest du mit einem langen Atem hinuntertauchen und unvergessliche Fotos machen. Mit Apnea Trainer ist das möglich. Bei dreimal wöchentlichem Training erreichst du schnell die doppelte Zeit unter Wasser.

Dein persönlicher Trainingsplan:
Beantworte ein paar kurze Fragen zu deinem Niveau und deinem Ziel – Apnea Trainer erstellt daraus einen mehrwöchigen Trainingsplan, der genau zu dir passt. Jede Einheit ist terminiert und baut auf der vorigen auf, sodass du Woche für Woche messbar besser wirst. Dein Fortschritt wird automatisch verfolgt – du musst nur noch trainieren.

Vier Trainingsmodi:
• Apnea Training – Einatmen, Anhalten, Ausatmen. Optimale Intervalle für maximale Leistungssteigerung.
• Pranayama – Vier-Phasen-Atmung zur Entspannung und Vorbereitung direkt vor dem Schnorcheln oder Freitauchen.
• Cyclic – Zyklisches Atemtraining in Runden mit Halte- und Erholungsphasen, das deine CO₂-Toleranz gezielt steigert.
• Custom Pro – Alle vier Phasen frei einstellbar von 0 bis 240 Sekunden für Wettkampfsportler.

Der intelligente Performance-Index passt die Trainingszeiten automatisch an dein Niveau an – du wirst besser, ohne selbst rechnen zu müssen. Optische und akustische Anweisungen (Stimmen und Haptik) begleiten jede Phase. Kein Nachdenken nötig – einfach trainieren.

Apple Watch:
Starte und steuere dein Training direkt vom Handgelenk. Während der Übung siehst du deine Herzfrequenz live und wirst durch sanfte Vibrationen durch jede Phase geführt – ganz ohne aufs iPhone zu schauen.

Stoppuhr & Fortschritt:
Mit der integrierten Apnoe-Stoppuhr misst und speicherst du deine besten Atemanhalteversuche. Verfolge deine Bestleistungen im Wochen-, Monats- oder Jahresdiagramm und teile besondere Meilensteine mit Freunden.

Motivierendes Streak-System:
Bleib dran und tauche immer tiefer. Halte deine tägliche Trainings-Serie, steige durch immer tiefere Zonen und sammle über 35 Auszeichnungen für Konstanz, Volumen und persönliche Rekorde. Verpasst du einen Tag, rettet ein Freeze-Joker deine Serie. Freigeschaltete Erfolge und neue Bestzeiten teilst du mit einem Tipp als schönes Bild in deinen sozialen Netzwerken.

Datenschutz & Sync ohne Account:
Deine Fortschritte werden ohne Anmeldung oder Account sicher über iCloud zwischen all deinen Apple-Geräten synchronisiert. Die Daten liegen ausschließlich in deiner privaten iCloud-Datenbank – kein Tracking, keine Weitergabe, höchste Datenschutzstandards.

Mehr als 10.000 aktive Nutzer bestätigen den Erfolg: Ungeübte können binnen 7 Tagen ihre Leistung verdoppeln, wenn Apnea Trainer täglich 3 Minuten genutzt wird. Bei fortgeschrittenen Sportlern sind konstante Leistungssprünge von 10 bis 20 Sekunden innerhalb von 10 Tagen bekannt.

Nutzungsbedingungen (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Datenschutz: https://apnea-trainer.com/de/privacy/

tw.description:
壹、遊戲背景
昔日碌碌無為，消磨光陰。後受教於南賢智者，立誌成為武林盟主，為此踏上江湖征程。

二、遊戲特色
-單機、聯網均可玩的RPG。
-武俠劇情，環環相扣。
-江湖友人，相伴同行。
-武林之行，可正可邪。
-江湖問道，高人指點。
-江湖奇遇，武學進階。
-江湖秘境，暗藏珍寶。
-奪得神杖，無限重玩。
-俠客掛機，快速升級。
-高度自由的世界大地圖，近百座情景建築。
-數百種武功可學，絕藝不限於耍刀、禦劍與拳掌。

us.description:
GenChord Guitar is a chord and music theory tool built around the guitar fretboard. It does more than show where to place your fingers. It connects chords, scales, fingering shapes, diatonic harmony, and tensions on the same fretboard, so you can understand why each voicing works.

Use the Library to search chords by root, type, and tension, including triads, seventh chords, sixth chords, sus, aug, dim, half-dim, b5, #5, bb7, and 9/11/13 tensions. Open Chord Explain to see the same chord across the Mi, Sol, La, Si, and Re shapes, which correspond to the CAGED system.

Generate I-VII diatonic chords from major, minor, harmonic minor, melodic minor, and church modes. Start from any string and fret in the Fingering Tool to build a scale shape and the chords inside it. Play voicings as strums, arpeggios, or randomized notes, then save useful chords into Collections with iCloud Drive or local storage.

GenChord Guitar is a fretboard-first way to study harmony, guitar voicings, accompaniment, arranging, and improvisation.

This time, you can learn chords and scales visually. Explore the structure of chords by moving different chord tones. You’ll gain a thorough understanding of the origins of chord names. This app can generate every chord structure you can imagine, making it easy to look up and memorize them. The process of understanding music should be clear and simple. GenChord helps you uncover the core principles behind music. More features are continuously being updated.

· Library – Quick Chord Lookup
Generate every possible chord from a music theory perspective—no need to wonder if the list is complete. Tap to play the chord, long press to arpeggiate, swipe right for details.

· Query - Chord Reverse Finder. Reverse lookup for basic chords / omit chords / inverted chords / chords with all added tensions. In the playground, Bluetooth connection and MIDI cable connection are also supported. Now you can enjoy features that were previously available only to PC users.

· Create – Your Own Chords
collect and curate chord progressions. Enjoy more control features, add memory curves, and include numbered notation. Rearrange and combine freely—one chord can evolve into endless variations. Your pop/jazz assistant—you deserve it.

· Playground – Music Sandbox
For teaching, training, and testing—your free space to play music and your Swiss Army knife for creation. Highly recommended: the Diatonic Chords feature to explore beautiful progressions. Tap anytime, anywhere to trigger inspiring notes.

Run Japan's trains!

No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Train!".
This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power.


Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations.
Start the trains and transport your customers.

You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train.
Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue.
Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue.

The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, express fares will also appear.

No technical knowledge is required at all.
Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game.

There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads.
Please concentrate on the game.
Share your operating results on social media.

us.releaseNotes:
Introducing frame and building benchmark examples and extensive improvements throughout the app!

• NEW: Examples gallery in the home screen, including new examples for frames and buildings.  Click on the button with a book icon to open it.

• NEW: The new eyedropper button in the frame editor allows you to copy the material and cross-section from one beam to another.  To use it, select a beam, press the eyedropper button, and then select another beam to copy from.

• FIXED: Cross section stress analysis for angles and zees is now performed along their principal axes rather than geometric axes.

• IMPROVED: Numerous performance, stability, layout, and interaction enhancements in the 2D editor, especially when working with large models.

Thank you for your continued support and feedback!  Reach us at contact@ketchep.com with any questions or comments.
us.description:
Deflection is a powerful, versatile calculator for beams, 2D trusses, and 2D frames.  The interface is simple and intuitive, and the graphical output is state-of-the-art.  In addition to reaction, shear, bending moment, and deflection results, Deflection also computes internal shear and bending stress along the cross section and along the beam.

2D FRAME AND TRUSS EDITOR

The 2D editor is seamlessly integrated with the beam editor.  Draw arbitrary frame and truss structures and apply loads and constraints using the same simple interface as for beams.  You can visualize results directly within the 2D editor, or you can select a beam and get additional insights. 

INTERNAL STRESSES

Obtain internal bending and shear stress diagrams in addition to shear, bending, and deflection diagrams.  The internal stresses can be visualized along the length of the beam as well as along the vertical axis of the cross section using the beam editor.

CROSS SECTION EDITOR

Edit built-in cross sections.  Moment of inertia and area values are automatically calculated and applied to the rest of the beam calculations.

MORE FEATURES

• The built-in database contains more data for your reference and convenience.
• Apply beam self-weight optionally
• Unlimited design files
• Quick-start templates

CONTACT

We like to hear from you!  Please email contact@ketchep.com if you have any issues, questions, or comments.

us.releaseNotes: Star in the live-action interactive drama! Shape a dynasty's fate in Road to Empress II, the new content of the global hit. Defy fate, claim the throne—you decide it all!
us.description:
This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters.

A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices!
Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power.

● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues
Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally.
Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory!

● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined
Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast!

● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story!
Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne.

● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life
With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate!
You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings.

● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm
A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips:

Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush.
Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision!

● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked
At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile!

About New One Studio

An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage.

Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan.

Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress.

In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage.

In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you!

(Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.)

YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial
X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

us.trackName: 三國志天下布武 - 單機戰棋策略遊戲
us.description:
限時活動：下載即送「超值大禮包」建功立業快人一步！

這是我們開發的一款單機向SLG
借鑒和學習了《三國志》、《霸王的大陸》系列，
內容豐富耐玩，上手後極易沉迷，
遊戲沒有大額付費，就算不付費也可以愉快的玩幾十個小時。
但由於難度較高，強烈不建議新手上來就挑戰困難難度。

【遊戲特點】
豐富的戰鬥陣形和技能，
在戰斗場景中山河、湖泊、城關等不同地形上有變化多端的戰術組合，
加上天氣系統對戰局的影響，使得戰場玩法極具特色。

根據面對敵人的情況不同，
不同戰術可以形成各自的打法流派，
常見的如搶城速攻流、近戰突擊流，單挑控制流、遠射連珠流等等。

數十萬字原創遊戲文本，全部源自製作團隊對相關史料的分析提煉，
各種武將列傳、軼事；各地的背景介紹，皆有可靠的依據出處。
玩家玩遊戲的同時能感受到那個時代的文化氣息、社會風貌，
從更豐富的層面帶玩家領略濃厚的歷史人文精神。

【玩家攻略社区】 
Facebook:三國志天下布武 

Line:sanguo15



【為什麼選擇開發這款遊戲】
我從小便沉迷於《霸王的大陸》和光榮的《三國志》，
但市面上很難找到類似玩法的手機遊戲。
於是我做了一個，只是沒想到，這個歷程是如此的艱難。

我常常跟同是做這類產品的朋友浪子交流，他說《漢末霸業》一路走來，一樣殊為不易，在這個年代想要有自己的堅持，必須付出相當的代價。

經常有朋友問我，“為什麼不去做別的更賺錢的遊戲？”
的確，我們的這款遊戲不怎麼賺錢，
不充值都可以玩的很開心，充個幾十能嗨皮幾個月。

朋友的這個問題，是對我的靈魂拷問。
因為我的年紀已經不小了，拖家帶口的，這個問題必須正視。
但朋友說的“那種賺錢的遊戲”，我不喜歡。

朋友不理解我對這種遊戲的感情。
在那個網吧還只有局域網的年代，
這個品類的遊戲伴著我度過了無數個日日夜夜。
為了統一全國殫精竭慮，以至於茶飯不思、夙夜難眠。
那時的我，是沉浸的，是幸福的。
而現在，我有機會能利用我的專業技能把這種感受發揚光大。
把我自己對這種遊戲的理解傾注到產品之中，
置於更大的平台之上，
讓更多跟我同樣喜歡這類游戲的玩家體會到這種快樂，
這是一種使命，一種榮譽。

能做這個遊戲，是我人生中最幸福的事情。
我還有很多關於它的想法，已經在心頭縈繞多年，
我想要呈現的，還遠不止之前大家曾看到的。
如果能賺錢，我會把這個遊戲一直做下去。
如果賺不到，我就先去做點別的，用賺來的錢把這個遊戲繼續做下去。

逝水東流，青山依舊，是非成敗，任人評說。
我素未謀面的朋友們，祝你們玩得開心。



——遊戲製作人：奶牛

Ranked in the top 5 best-selling sports apps in Germany, Australia, the UK, and France.

----- Description -----
The precise breath-holding training app for freedivers, snorkelers, and anyone who wants to hold their breath longer.

Imagine you’re snorkeling in the ocean on vacation and see big, colorful fish 6 meters below the surface—you’d love to dive down on a single breath and take unforgettable photos. With Apnea Trainer, that’s possible. By training three times a week, you’ll quickly double your time underwater.

Your personalized training plan:
Answer a few short questions about your skill level and your goal—Apnea Trainer will use this information to create a training plan spanning several weeks that’s tailored just for you. Each session is scheduled and builds on the previous one, so you’ll see measurable improvement week after week. Your progress is tracked automatically—all you have to do is train.

Four training modes:
• Apnea Training – Inhale, hold your breath, exhale. Optimal intervals for maximum performance improvement.
• Pranayama – Four-phase breathing for relaxation and preparation right before snorkeling or freediving.
• Cyclic – Cyclical breathing training in rounds with hold and recovery phases that specifically increases your CO₂ tolerance.
• Custom Pro – All four phases freely adjustable from 0 to 240 seconds for competitive athletes.

The smart Performance Index automatically adjusts training times to your level—you’ll improve without having to do the math yourself. Visual and audio cues (voice prompts and haptic feedback) guide you through each phase. No need to think—just train.

Apple Watch:
Start and control your workout right from your wrist. During the exercise, you’ll see your heart rate in real time and be guided through each phase by gentle vibrations—without having to look at your iPhone.

Stopwatch & Progress:
With the built-in apnea stopwatch, you can measure and save your best breath-hold attempts. Track your personal bests on weekly, monthly, or yearly charts and share special milestones with friends.

Motivating Streak System:
Stay on track and dive deeper and deeper. Maintain your daily workout streak, advance through deeper and deeper zones, and earn over 35 awards for consistency, volume, and personal records. If you miss a day, a “Freeze” joker will save your streak. Share your unlocked achievements and new personal bests with a single tap as a beautiful image on your social media.

Privacy & Sync Without an Account:
Your progress is securely synced across all your Apple devices via iCloud without requiring registration or an account. The data is stored exclusively in your private iCloud database—no tracking, no sharing, and the highest privacy standards.

More than 10,000 active users confirm its success: Beginners can double their performance within 7 days by using Apnea Trainer for 3 minutes daily. Advanced athletes have reported consistent performance gains of 10 to 20 seconds within 10 days.

Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Privacy Policy: https://apnea-trainer.com/privacy/

Master the Weapons of the Gods
Solve puzzles and defeat enemies traverse the dungeons of each Arma, towers made from the fallen weapons of the gods.

Seek Out Trinitia’s Mysteries

tr.description:
Deflection is a powerful, versatile calculator for beams, 2D trusses, and 2D frames.  The interface is simple and intuitive, and the graphical output is state-of-the-art.  In addition to reaction, shear, bending moment, and deflection results, Deflection also computes internal shear and bending stress along the cross section and along the beam.

2D FRAME AND TRUSS EDITOR

The 2D editor is seamlessly integrated with the beam editor.  Draw arbitrary frame and truss structures and apply loads and constraints using the same simple interface as for beams.  You can visualize results directly within the 2D editor, or you can select a beam and get additional insights. 

INTERNAL STRESSES

Obtain internal bending and shear stress diagrams in addition to shear, bending, and deflection diagrams.  The internal stresses can be visualized along the length of the beam as well as along the vertical axis of the cross section using the beam editor.

CROSS SECTION EDITOR

Edit built-in cross sections.  Moment of inertia and area values are automatically calculated and applied to the rest of the beam calculations.

MORE FEATURES

• The built-in database contains more data for your reference and convenience.
• Apply beam self-weight optionally
• Unlimited design files
• Quick-start templates

CONTACT

We like to hear from you!  Please email contact@ketchep.com if you have any issues, questions, or comments.

tr.description:
Your Camera, Your Looks, Your Way.

Moment Pro Camera II turns your phone into your favorite camera for photography and filmmaking. Shoot like a pro with full manual controls, creative looks, and an upgraded interface – all in one intuitive app.

What’s New in Pro Camera II?

Our first pro camera app has been the #1 rated camera app for years. Now, it’s time for the next chapter. We’ve re-engineered Pro Camera II from the ground up to give you better performance, advanced controls, and new customizable interfaces and shooting modes.

Key Features:

• Pro-Level Exposure Control – Our smart exposure system allows you to take control with Shutter Priority, ISO Priority, Manual, and Auto exposure modes, including the ability to limit Auto ISO to a specific range.
• Upgraded White Balance – Beyond auto white balance, you can manually configure temperature and tint, choose a preset, or calibrate via a gray card.
• Advanced Photo Options – Control the level of processing and HDR applied to your photos. Shoot in RAW, ProRAW, TIFF, HEIF, or JPG.
• Cinematic Video Tools – Apple Log, Open Gate, ProRes, 10-bit recording, and more. Adjust the resolution, color space, frame rate, codec, bitrate, and chroma subsampling for total creative freedom.
• Precision Monitoring – Get pro-level feedback with Waveform, RGB Histograms, and audio meters — normally reserved for cinema cameras.
• Aspect Ratio – Frame your shot within your favorite aspect ratio (4:3, 16:9, 3:2, 5:4, 1:1)
• Designed for All Creators – A beautiful, intuitive interface that adapts to how you shoot. Swipe, tap, and adjust anything immediately with one hand (including a dedicated left-handed layout), or go distraction-free with Zen Mode. Works natively in landscape orientation.
• Looks, Your Way – Apply creative Looks or import your own LUTs to video and photos. Preview them live, bake them into your footage, or adjust intensity on the fly.
• Focus Tools That Just Work – Separate reticles for exposure and focus with a tap, or dial in the shot with Manual Focus and Focus Peaking.
• Quick Actions, Faster Shooting – One swipe to reach your most used tools: flash, stabilization, zebras, focus peaking, grids, and more.
• Intuitive Lens Control – Remove the guesswork of which lens you are using and eliminate surprises with our Optic Controls. Say goodbye to shaky zoom with our fluid zoom control.

Upcoming Feature Releases

We love hearing from our community. For feature requests, ideas, or support, email us at hello@shopmoment.com or message us @momentprocamera on social media.

tr.description:
Ranked in the top 5 best-selling sports apps in Germany, Australia, the UK, and France.

----- Description -----
The precise breath-holding training app for freedivers, snorkelers, and anyone who wants to hold their breath longer.

Imagine you’re snorkeling in the ocean on vacation and see big, colorful fish 6 meters below the surface—you’d love to dive down on a single breath and take unforgettable photos. With Apnea Trainer, that’s possible. By training three times a week, you’ll quickly double your time underwater.

Your personalized training plan:
Answer a few short questions about your skill level and your goal—Apnea Trainer will use this information to create a training plan spanning several weeks that’s tailored just for you. Each session is scheduled and builds on the previous one, so you’ll see measurable improvement week after week. Your progress is tracked automatically—all you have to do is train.

Four training modes:
• Apnea Training – Inhale, hold your breath, exhale. Optimal intervals for maximum performance improvement.
• Pranayama – Four-phase breathing for relaxation and preparation right before snorkeling or freediving.
• Cyclic – Cyclical breathing training in rounds with hold and recovery phases that specifically increases your CO₂ tolerance.
• Custom Pro – All four phases freely adjustable from 0 to 240 seconds for competitive athletes.

The smart Performance Index automatically adjusts training times to your level—you’ll improve without having to do the math yourself. Visual and audio cues (voice prompts and haptic feedback) guide you through each phase. No need to think—just train.

Apple Watch:
Start and control your workout right from your wrist. During the exercise, you’ll see your heart rate in real time and be guided through each phase by gentle vibrations—without having to look at your iPhone.

Stopwatch & Progress:
With the built-in apnea stopwatch, you can measure and save your best breath-hold attempts. Track your personal bests on weekly, monthly, or yearly charts and share special milestones with friends.

Motivating Streak System:
Stay on track and dive deeper and deeper. Maintain your daily workout streak, advance through deeper and deeper zones, and earn over 35 awards for consistency, volume, and personal records. If you miss a day, a “Freeze” joker will save your streak. Share your unlocked achievements and new personal bests with a single tap as a beautiful image on your social media.

Privacy & Sync Without an Account:
Your progress is securely synced across all your Apple devices via iCloud without requiring registration or an account. The data is stored exclusively in your private iCloud database—no tracking, no sharing, and the highest privacy standards.

More than 10,000 active users confirm its success: Beginners can double their performance within 7 days by using Apnea Trainer for 3 minutes daily. Advanced athletes have reported consistent performance gains of 10 to 20 seconds within 10 days.

pt.description:
GenChord Guitar é uma ferramenta de acordes e teoria musical criada para o braço da guitarra. Não mostra apenas onde colocar os dedos: liga acordes, escalas, formas de digitação, harmonia diatónica e tensões no mesmo braço.

Pesquise por fundamental, tipo de acorde e tensão. A Library cobre tríades, acordes de sétima, sexta, sus, aug, dim, half-dim, b5, #5, bb7 e tensões 9/11/13. Chord Explain mostra o mesmo acorde nas formas Mi, Sol, La, Si e Re, relacionadas com o CAGED.

Gere acordes diatónicos I-VII a partir de maior, menor, menor harmónica, menor melódica e modos. No Fingering Tool, comece em qualquer corda e traste, ouça voicings como strum ou arpejo e guarde em Collections com iCloud Drive ou armazenamento local.

pt.description:
Desta vez, você pode aprender acordes e escalas visualmente. Explore a estrutura dos acordes movendo diferentes notas de cada acorde. Você obterá uma compreensão completa da origem dos nomes dos acordes. Este aplicativo pode gerar toda a estrutura de acordes que você imaginar, facilitando consultá-los e memorizá-los. O processo de entender música deve ser claro e simples. O GenChord ajuda você a descobrir os princípios essenciais por trás da música. 

· Biblioteca – Consulta rápida de acordes
Gere todos os acordes possíveis a partir da perspectiva da teoria musical — sem precisar se perguntar se a lista está completa. Toque para ouvir o acorde, pressione longamente para arpejar, deslize para a direita para ver detalhes.

· Query – Consulta: Busca reversa de acordes. Busca reversa para acordes básicos / acordes omitidos / acordes invertidos / todos os acordes com tensões adicionadas. No Playground, também são suportadas conexões via Bluetooth e cabo MIDI. Agora você pode aproveitar recursos que antes estavam disponíveis apenas para usuários de PC.

· Criar – Seus próprios acordes
Colete e organize progressões de acordes. Aproveite mais recursos de controle, adicione curvas de memória e inclua notação numérica. Reorganize e combine livremente — um acorde pode evoluir em variações infinitas. Seu assistente de pop/jazz — você merece.

· Playground – Caixa de música
Para ensino, treino e testes — seu espaço livre para tocar música e sua ferramenta multifuncional para criação. Altamente recomendado: o recurso Acordes Diatônicos para explorar progressões bonitas. Toque a qualquer hora e lugar para disparar notas inspiradoras.

Façam os comboios japoneses funcionar!

Não é necessário nenhum conhecimento ferroviário para jogar "Tokyo Train!".
Este jogo é um jogo de cérebro com regras simples, mas requer muito poder cerebral.

Os clientes esperam na estação que os comboios cheguem para os levar aos seus destinos.
Comece os comboios e transporte os seus clientes.

Ganharão dinheiro por cada passageiro que embarcar num comboio.
Ajuste o intervalo entre as viagens e o número de vagões para alcançar a maior receita.
A partida dos comboios custa dinheiro. Se enviar demasiados comboios e a taxa de embarque baixar, perderá as suas receitas.

O método de operação é muito fácil e as regras são simples.
Só tem de ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem na melhor altura.
À medida que o jogo avança, as tarifas expressas também aparecerão.

Não é necessário qualquer conhecimento técnico.
Tanto as pessoas que gostam de comboios como as pessoas que gostam de jogos podem rapidamente compreender e desfrutar do jogo.

Não há compras em espera. Não há anúncios.
Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo.
Partilhe os seus resultados operacionais nas redes sociais.

pt.description:
Flexão é uma calculadora poderosa e versátil para vigas, treliças 2D e estruturas 2D. A interface é simples e intuitiva, e a saída gráfica é de última geração. Além dos resultados de reação, cisalhamento, momento fletor e deflexão, Flexão também calcula as tensões internas de cisalhamento e de flexão ao longo da seção transversal e ao longo da viga.

EDITOR DE ESTRUTURAS 2D E TRELIÇAS

O editor 2D é integrado de forma contínua com o editor de vigas. Desenhe estruturas de treliças e estruturas 2D arbitrárias e aplique cargas e restrições usando a mesma interface simples das vigas. Você pode visualizar os resultados diretamente no editor 2D, ou selecionar uma viga para obter insights adicionais.

TENSÕES INTERNAS

Obtenha diagramas de tensão interna de flexão e cisalhamento, além de diagramas de cisalhamento, flexão e deflexão. As tensões internas podem ser visualizadas ao longo do comprimento da viga, bem como ao longo do eixo vertical da seção transversal.

EDITOR DE SEÇÃO TRANSVERSAL

Edite seções transversais pré-definidas. Os valores de momento de inércia e área são automaticamente calculados e aplicados ao restante dos cálculos da viga.

MAIS RECURSOS

• O banco de dados integrado contém mais dados para sua referência e conveniência.
• Aplicar opcionalmente o peso próprio da viga
• Arquivos de projeto ilimitados
• Modelos de início rápido

CONTATO

Gostamos de ouvir de você! Por favor, envie um email para contact@ketchep.com se tiver algum problema, dúvida ou comentário.

pt.description:
Top 5 Platzierung in Deutschland, Australien, UK und Frankreich der meist verkauften Sport Apps.

----- Beschreibung -----
Die präzise Atemtraining-App für Freitaucher, Schnorchler und alle, die länger die Luft anhalten wollen.

Stell dir vor, du schnorchelst im Urlaub im Meer und siehst unter Wasser große bunte Fische in 6 Meter Tiefe – am liebsten möchtest du mit einem langen Atem hinuntertauchen und unvergessliche Fotos machen. Mit Apnea Trainer ist das möglich. Bei dreimal wöchentlichem Training erreichst du schnell die doppelte Zeit unter Wasser.

Dein persönlicher Trainingsplan:
Beantworte ein paar kurze Fragen zu deinem Niveau und deinem Ziel – Apnea Trainer erstellt daraus einen mehrwöchigen Trainingsplan, der genau zu dir passt. Jede Einheit ist terminiert und baut auf der vorigen auf, sodass du Woche für Woche messbar besser wirst. Dein Fortschritt wird automatisch verfolgt – du musst nur noch trainieren.

Vier Trainingsmodi:
• Apnea Training – Einatmen, Anhalten, Ausatmen. Optimale Intervalle für maximale Leistungssteigerung.
• Pranayama – Vier-Phasen-Atmung zur Entspannung und Vorbereitung direkt vor dem Schnorcheln oder Freitauchen.
• Cyclic – Zyklisches Atemtraining in Runden mit Halte- und Erholungsphasen, das deine CO₂-Toleranz gezielt steigert.
• Custom Pro – Alle vier Phasen frei einstellbar von 0 bis 240 Sekunden für Wettkampfsportler.

Der intelligente Performance-Index passt die Trainingszeiten automatisch an dein Niveau an – du wirst besser, ohne selbst rechnen zu müssen. Optische und akustische Anweisungen (Stimmen und Haptik) begleiten jede Phase. Kein Nachdenken nötig – einfach trainieren.

Apple Watch:
Starte und steuere dein Training direkt vom Handgelenk. Während der Übung siehst du deine Herzfrequenz live und wirst durch sanfte Vibrationen durch jede Phase geführt – ganz ohne aufs iPhone zu schauen.

Stoppuhr & Fortschritt:
Mit der integrierten Apnoe-Stoppuhr misst und speicherst du deine besten Atemanhalteversuche. Verfolge deine Bestleistungen im Wochen-, Monats- oder Jahresdiagramm und teile besondere Meilensteine mit Freunden.

Motivierendes Streak-System:
Bleib dran und tauche immer tiefer. Halte deine tägliche Trainings-Serie, steige durch immer tiefere Zonen und sammle über 35 Auszeichnungen für Konstanz, Volumen und persönliche Rekorde. Verpasst du einen Tag, rettet ein Freeze-Joker deine Serie. Freigeschaltete Erfolge und neue Bestzeiten teilst du mit einem Tipp als schönes Bild in deinen sozialen Netzwerken.

Datenschutz & Sync ohne Account:
Deine Fortschritte werden ohne Anmeldung oder Account sicher über iCloud zwischen all deinen Apple-Geräten synchronisiert. Die Daten liegen ausschließlich in deiner privaten iCloud-Datenbank – kein Tracking, keine Weitergabe, höchste Datenschutzstandards.

Mehr als 10.000 aktive Nutzer bestätigen den Erfolg: Ungeübte können binnen 7 Tagen ihre Leistung verdoppeln, wenn Apnea Trainer täglich 3 Minuten genutzt wird. Bei fortgeschrittenen Sportlern sind konstante Leistungssprünge von 10 bis 20 Sekunden innerhalb von 10 Tagen bekannt.

Nutzungsbedingungen (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Datenschutz: https://apnea-trainer.com/de/privacy/
